_schema: Diner leads (Director: the diner is where the county becomes readable - a lead generator, not just gossip). Condition checked against live state; first match wins; 'nothing' is the fallback and that's fine - the diner should not always pay off. Lines are scratch placeholders awaiting Director wording (law 6). Blanks L1-L4.

lines: [BLANK L1 — Patti mentions Marge has paper on the board with your name all but written on it. Awaiting Director.]
[BLANK L2 — somebody saw something come into the Weaver yard worth a look, and Gus doesn't hold things long. Awaiting Director.]
[BLANK L3 — elevator whisper: corn's moving, and the folks who haul early tend to eat better. Awaiting Director.]
[BLANK L4 — a slow day at the diner: no leads, just the county being itself. Flavor, not payoff. Awaiting Director.]
